name: id
doc: Read the DG645 device identification string.

name: reset
doc: Reset the unit to default configurations.

name: local
doc: Return the DG645 to local/front-panel control.

name: last_error
doc: Read the last error from the DG645 error queue.

name: trigger_level
doc: Set/query external trigger threshold level in volts.

name: trigger_rate
doc: Set/query internal trigger rate in Hz.

name: trigger_source
doc: Set/query trigger source. 0=internal 1=external rising 2=external falling 3=single-shot external rising 4=single-shot external falling 5=single-shot 6=line.

name: delay
doc: Set/query delay channel relative to a reference channel. Channels: 0=T0 1=T1 2=A 3=B 4=C 5=D 6=E 7=F 8=G 9=H.

name: amplitude
doc: Set/query front panel output amplitude. Outputs: 0=T0 1=AB 2=CD 3=EF 4=GH
